Description: An apex predator in the Ninth, this winged beast terrorizes the lands near Treno, swooping down from great heights to seize large prey. Folk who venture outside the barrier must remain on watch for the creature, which soars the levin-racked skies unperturbed due to its ability to manipulate lightning.
